contractErrors.NotInitialized: Mkataba bado haujasanidiwa. Tafadhali wasiliana na usaidizi.
contractErrors.PlayerNotFound: Mchezaji hajapatikana. Tafadhali angalia kitambulisho cha mchezaji na ujaribu tena.
contractErrors.UnauthorizedValidator: Huna ruhusa kama mthibitishaji kufanya kitendo hiki.
contractErrors.InvalidMilestone: Kiwango kilichoainishwa si halali. Tafadhali thibitisha maelezo.
contractErrors.AlreadyAtLevel: Mchezaji yuko tayari katika kiwango hiki.
contractErrors.InsufficientFee: Salio haitoshi. Tafadhali ongeza fedha kwenye pochi yako.
contractErrors.SubscriptionExpired: Usajili wako umekwisha muda. Tafadhali uhuishe ili kuendelea.
contractErrors.ContractPaused: Mkataba umesimamishwa kwa sasa. Tafadhali jaribu tena baadaye.
contractErrors.NoFeesToWithdraw: Hakuna ada zinazopatikana kwa uchukuzi kwa sasa.
contractErrors.Overflow: Kosa la hesabu limetokea. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
contractErrors.unknown: Kosa lisilotarajiwa limetokea. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
